prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWC-100GLBH-5X325-OVL Product Type: BADGE_HOLDER Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal Bifold Leather Credit Card ID Badge Holder Wallet Police Gear, Oval Description: The ASR Federal Bifold Leather Credit Card ID Police Badge Holder Wallet has been specifically designed for carrying police or other professional private or public safety badges; this ID badge holder comes with a clear cover ID slot and features a recessed badge insert for an OVAL shaped badge, as well as a suede concealment flap to secure and protect badges from sight or scratches.

The recessed badge design compartment keeps the ID badge holders' profile minimal and compact, whilst still carrying other identification and cash if desired. If credit cards or other forms of identification are needed to be carried on person, a clear credit card insert is included with purchase and slides into the clear cover ID slot to keep cards safe and secure when you're on the move.

Constructed from high quality, genuine and heavy gauge black leather, these police gear ID badge holders boast a strong and sturdy construction, made for long last lasting durability. And, while the wallet may seem stiff at first, time and use will soften the leather wallets fabrication to your carrying habits.

Badge Attachment: Clip back pin, no screws required
Maximum Badge Size: 3 3/8 x 2 1/4 inches
Maximum Credit Card or ID Size: 2 3/4 x 4 inches

MADE IN THE USA

NOTE: Police Badge is NOT included with purchase Search Terms: law enforcement tactical gear CIA FBI spy minimalist wallet credit card id holder cop private investigator equipment security detective badge display case travel accessories criminal investigation crime scene Features: - POLICE ID BADGE HOLDER: Police badge holder come with a clear cover ID slot and features a recessed badge insert for a round shaped badge, as well as a suede concealment flap for discretion and badge protection - RECESSED POLICE BADGE DESIGN: The recessed badge design compartment keeps the overall id badge holder minimalist wallet profile minimal and compact; this leather wallet also features a cash compartment and removable credit card holder - HIGH QUALITY LEATHER: This leather police badge holder boasts strong and sturdy construction, made from 100% genuine, heavy gauge leather for long last lasting durability; stiff at first, this ID badge holder will soften to your carrying habits with time and use - CREDIT CARD HOLDER INCLUDED: If credit cards or other forms of identification are needed on person, a clear flexible plastic removable credit card insert is included with purchase and slides into the clear cover ID slot to keep it in place - SPECIFICATIONS: Wallet size: 3.5 x 4.5 inches; Maximum Card Size: 2.75 x 4 inches; Color: Black; Made in USA; Badge attachment is clip-back pin (no screws required); Badge Compartment Size: 3 3/8 x 2 1/4 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
